title: Contact - Derek Twigg MP
meta_description: Member of Parliament for Widnes and Halewood                                     (Including Whiston, Hale Village, Cronton, Halebank & Tarbock)
text_excerpt: Contact - Derek Twigg MP Skip to main content Derek Twigg MP Member of Parliament for Widnes and Halewood (Including Whiston, Hale Village, Cronton, Halebank & Tarbock) Get In Touch Join Donate Home About Derek Contact Our Constituency Derek in Parliament EDM Policy Hough Green & Ditton Neighbourhood Plan More Search Search the website Search Menu Contact There is a strict Parliamentary protocol that states that Members of Parliament can only raise issues for their own constituents. If you are unsure whether I am your MP, you can check who your MP is by clicking here. If you are a constituent, please use the below contact details, and a member of my team will get back in touch with you: Email: derek.twigg.mp@parliament.uk (please include your name, address and phone number) Phone: 0151 424 7030 (Calls are endeavoured to be answered Monday – Friday 9.30am – 4pm. However, the phone line can be busy and I have a small team. If you receive the answer machine message, please leave a message, including your name, address and phone number). There is also a 24 hour answer machine. Please note that if you are contacting on behalf of another individual, in most cases, their direct consent will be required. I respect your right to privacy. The personal information that I hold about you is governed by legal regulations. My Privacy Policy sets out what information I hold, for what reason, how it is stored and how you can query this with me. You can read my Privacy Policy here . IMPORTANT: By completing this form, you give me permission to contact you and use the information that you have provided to make representations on your behalf to other organisations. Derek Twigg MP Contact details Email: derek.twigg.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Andrea Wall on behalf of Derek Twigg both C/O Suite E, Cheshire House, Gorsey Lane, Widnes, WA8 0RP ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
